headline: Datadog Targets AI Agent Workflows With MCP Server And Cohesity Tie Up
summary: Datadog (NasdaqGS:DDOG) has launched its MCP Server, designed to provide secure, real-time observability for AI agent powered development and operations. The company also announced an integration with Cohesity focused on AI Agent Resilience and rapid recovery for AI heavy environments. Together, these moves aim to embed Datadog more deeply into AI native and mission critical enterprise workflows. For you as an investor, this sits at the intersection of Datadog’s core observability business...
